docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO JR, BONIFACIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BONIFACIO MALDONADO JR. APPEARED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED AUG-22-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO JR, BONIFACIO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT BONIFACIO MALDONADO JR. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
